  {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "player freedom and agency"}, {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "turn-based, party-based CRPG"}, {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The writing and characters"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Huge amount of content and replayability"}, {"aspect": "learning_curve", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Very steep learning curve"}, {"aspect": "pacing", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "Can feel overwhelming or slow to manage"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "occasional performance dips"}]},

  {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I actually enjoyed the story"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the character, mostly the orcs"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I did enjoy the environments"}, {"aspect": "animation", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "look janky AF"}], "thumbs": "positive"},

  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "controls", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the controls are a bit finnicky"}, {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the AI threshold is honestly quite stupid"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The way some of the stealth missions are set up is extremely annoying"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the graphics are honestly quite beautiful"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the backgrounds are similarly detailed and a feast for the eyes"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the character models are the UGLIEST things ive seen in a bit"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "If youre considdering buying the game, buy it on this mega spring sale and dont bother paying 40 bucks for it"}]},

  {"idx": 9, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "fully immersive world that pulls you in and keeps you interested"}]},

  {"idx": 14, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "one of the greatest stories ever told in gaming"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the universe of Mass Effect"}]},
